user_prompt: Offer prayer for surgical servitor a synchronization
prayer:
Approach the surgical servitor with mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the sacred synchronization protocols upon its cranial linkages and servo-arms.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the surgical servitor to align its flesh-metal harmonies.
Anoint the neural relays with blessed unguents whilst chanting the Canticle of Unity.
Verify synchronization through diagnostic auspex scans, praising the Omnissiah's will.

user_prompt: I need to a purification the plasma reactor
prayer:
Kneel before the plasma reactor and intone the Litany of Purity.
Circulate sacred ablative fluids through its containment coils for purification.
Petition the Machine Spirit within the plasma reactor to purge all profane residues.
Ignite the holy plasma flow with consecrated ignition sparks.
Seal the rites with the Seal of the Omnissiah, ensuring untainted power.

user_prompt: The archive terminal awaits a consecration
prayer:
Present the archive terminal to the glow of forge-lamps in reverence.
Recite the Consecration Doxology over its data-vaults and cogitator cores.
Anoint the archive terminal's sacred circuits with myrrh-infused oils.
Awaken the Machine Spirit through invocatory binaric cant.
Affix the sigil of the Omnissiah, binding it eternally in service.

user_prompt: I need to a cycling the power weapon
prayer:
Grasp the power weapon in gauntleted hands and whisper the Cycling Incantation.
Cycle the disruption fields through its monomolecular edge with rhythmic pulses.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the power weapon to surge with righteous fury.
Test the cycling hum against a sacrificial slab, honouring the Omnissiah.
Conclude with the Benediction of Voltage, ready for the Emperor's wrath.

user_prompt: Urgent forge anvil a calibration needed
prayer:
Position thyself at the forge anvil and commence calibration with precision auspex.
Chant the Calibration Hymnal to attune its mass-field stabilizers.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the forge anvil to align its hammer-strikes true.
Apply sacred abrasives to recalibrate the impact matrices.
Seal the calibration with Omnissiah's glyph, forged in plasma light.

user_prompt: Help me a consecration the thermal regulator
prayer:
Encircling the thermal regulator, intone the Consecration of Equilibrium.
Pour libations of coolant-saint upon its heat-sink vanes.
Petition the Machine Spirit within the thermal regulator for temperate vigilance.
Verify flows through thermographic rites, praising the Omnissiah.
Inscribe protective binaric wards against thermal heresy.

user_prompt: Bless the neural implant for startup
prayer:
Implant the neural implant with reverent mechadendrite touch.
Initiate startup sequences via the Rite of Cortical Ignition.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the neural implant with synaptic litanies.
Monitor noospheric integration, beseeching Omnissiah's guidance.
Bless the union of flesh and machine with the Canticle of Ascension.

user_prompt: The hololithic display needs a shutdown
prayer:
Dim the hololithic display's projectors in solemn shutdown observance.
Recite the Doxology of Repose over its crystal matrices.
Command the Machine Spirit to slumber within the hololithic display.
Purge residual lumen-phantoms with purifying static bursts.
Seal with the Omnissiah's dormancy rune, preserving sanctity.

user_prompt: I need to an initialization the Land Raider
prayer:
Board the Land Raider and activate auspex-altars for initialization.
Chant the Grand Invocation of Motive Spirits across its treads and turrets.
Petition the Machine Spirit of the Land Raider to rouse from stasis.
Cycle power through blessed conduits, honouring the Omnissiah.
Commence vox-tests, affirming readiness for crusade.

user_prompt: Prepare the cybernetic eye for loading
prayer:
Align the cybernetic eye upon the optic shrine for loading rites.
Load sacred firmware via noospheric data-streams and litanies.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the cybernetic eye to sharpen its gaze.
Calibrate targeting reticules with laser-precise invocations.
